name: Iguana Elbow Hold - Straddle No Hands 2

items: one shoulder, same side elbow, same side arm, back/shoulder, glutes (optional), head (optional)
one arm is holding the pole behind the body at the elbow, the other arm is in a fixed position of choice with no contact with the pole or the body
both legs are fully extended in straddle position, and on same side of the pole as the body
